mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.status, p.created_at AS createdAt, NVL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1) FROM reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ), 0) AS averageRating, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS reviewCount FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.id = #{productId}
SELECT picture_saved_location FROM product_pictures WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, product_id AS productId, stock, expire_date AS expireDate FROM product_options WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY expire_date ASC, id ASC

SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS price, SUM(pc.quantity) AS total_quantity, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation FROM purchases pc JOIN product_options po ON pc.product_option_id = po.id JOIN products p ON po.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.price, pp.picture_saved_location ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, p.id ASC FETCH FIRST 4 ROWS ONLY
